questions.text: Rate your current neck pain intensity

choices.A: I have no pain at the moment
choices.B: The pain is very mild at the moment
choices.C: The pain is moderate at the moment
choices.D: The pain is fairly severe at the moment
choices.E: The pain is very severe at the moment
choices.F: The pain is the worst imaginable at the moment

questions.text: How does neck pain affect your ability to look after yourself?

choices.A: I can look after myself normally without causing extra pain
choices.B: I can look after myself normally but it causes extra pain
choices.C: It is painful to look after myself and I am slow and careful
choices.D: I need some help but manage most of my personal care
choices.E: I need help every day in most aspects of self-care
choices.F: I do not get dressed, I wash with difficulty and stay in bed

questions.text: How does neck pain affect your ability to lift heavy weights?

choices.A: I can lift heavy weights without extra pain
choices.B: I can lift heavy weights but it gives extra pain
choices.C: Pain prevents me from lifting heavy objects off the floor, but I can manage if they are conveniently positioned, e.g. on a table
choices.D: Pain prevents me from lifting heavy weights but I can manage light to medium weights if they are conveniently positioned
choices.E: I can lift very light weights
choices.F: I cannot lift or carry anything at all

questions.text: How does neck pain affect your ability to read?

choices.A: I can read as much as I want to with no pain in my neck
choices.B: I can read as much as I want to with slight pain in my neck
choices.C: I can read as much as I want with moderate pain in my neck
choices.D: I can't read as much as I want because of moderate pain in my neck
choices.E: I can hardly read at all because of severe pain in my neck

choices.A: I have no headaches at all
choices.B: I have slight headaches which come infrequently
choices.C: I have moderate headaches which come infrequently
choices.D: I have moderate headaches which come frequently
choices.E: I have severe headaches which come frequently
choices.F: I have headaches almost all the time

questions.text: How does neck pain affect your ability to concentrate?

choices.A: I can concentrate fully when I want to with no difficulty
choices.B: I can concentrate fully when I want to with slight difficulty
choices.C: I have a fair degree of difficulty in concentrating when I want to
choices.D: I have a lot of difficulty in concentrating when I want to
choices.E: I have a great deal of difficulty in concentrating when I want to

questions.text: How does neck pain affect your ability to work?

choices.A: I can do as much work as I want to
choices.B: I can only do my usual work, but no more
choices.C: I can do most of my usual work, but no more
choices.D: I cannot do my usual work
choices.E: I can hardly do any work at all
choices.F: I can't do any work at all

questions.text: How does neck pain affect your ability to drive?

choices.A: I can drive my car without any neck pain
choices.B: I can drive my car as long as I want with slight pain in my neck
choices.C: I can drive my car as long as I want with moderate pain in my neck
choices.D: I can't drive my car as long as I want because of moderate pain in my neck
choices.E: I can hardly drive at all because of severe pain in my neck
choices.F: I can't drive my car at all

questions.text: How does neck pain affect your sleep?

choices.B: My sleep is slightly disturbed (less than 1 hr. sleepless)
choices.C: My sleep is mildly disturbed (1-2 hrs. sleepless)
choices.D: My sleep is moderately disturbed (2-3 hrs. sleepless)
choices.E: My sleep is greatly disturbed (3-5 hrs. sleepless)
choices.F: My sleep is completely disturbed (5-7 hrs. sleepless)

questions.text: How does neck pain affect your ability to engage in recreation activities?

choices.A: I am able to engage in all my recreation activities with no neck pain at all
choices.B: I am able to engage in all my recreation activities, with some pain in my neck
choices.C: I am able to engage in most, but not all of my usual recreation activities because of pain in my neck
choices.D: I am able to engage in a few of my usual recreation activities because of pain in my neck
choices.E: I can hardly do any recreation activities because of pain in my neck
choices.F: I can't do any recreation activities at all
